title: 4M | Mould and Paint | 3D Unicorns | Mould, Paint and Design 3D Magical Unicorns | Kids Age 3+,Pink
features: WHAT IS THIS? A plaster casting kit to mould and paint your very own 3D glitter unicorn figures
WHAT DOES THIS MAKE? This kit contains sufficient materials for 2 unicorns 7 cm in height
WHAT'S IN THE BOX? Unicorn mould (in 2 parts), carving tool, plaster powder x 2, paint pots, paint brush, glitter powder and instructions
A CREATIVE ART KIT! A great boxed kit to engage your child in art and creative craft
WHO IS THIS SUITABLE FOR? Ideal for children who love arts and crafts and are ages 5 years and above
description: Product Description A complete set to mould and paint your own unicorns. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 5 years old
